items.title: Pipeline trust discovery
items.name: Pipeline trust discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether forecast misses are driven more by stage hygiene gaps, weak activity trust, or inconsistent manager inspection behavior.
items.opportunity: Clarify which workflow changes move forecast confidence fastest in large enterprise segments.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve activity trust, manager inspection quality, and forecast reliability.

riskFocus.question: What most improves forecast trust in active enterprise segments?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Tighter manager inspection and cleaner activity capture will move forecast accuracy faster than stage rule changes alone.

plannedActivities: Compare misses by segment and inspection pattern.
Review activity trust gaps by connector.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which inspection and activity patterns become standard in Q2.

items.title: Revenue flow discovery
items.name: Revenue flow discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether complex quote delay is driven more by configuration ambiguity, discount approvals, or billing handoff friction.
items.opportunity: Clarify which changes compress quote cycle time without weakening control.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to reduce complex quote friction and smooth the contract-to-billing handoff.

riskFocus.question: Where does the most avoidable commercial delay occur?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Configuration ambiguity and approval routing create more delay than downstream billing handoff in the majority of complex deals.

plannedActivities: Map delay by quote complexity cohort.
Review approval loops by discount tier.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which quote and approval patterns become standard for Q2 enterprise motions.

items.title: Digital service discovery
items.name: Digital service discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether routine service deflection is constrained more by knowledge quality, weak AI action coverage, or poor fallback design.
items.opportunity: Clarify which changes most improve safe digital containment without hurting CSAT.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve self-service quality, AI action governance, and assisted fallback quality.

riskFocus.question: What most improves digital containment on routine issues?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Better answer quality plus narrower, safer AI action scopes will outperform simply exposing more bot entry points.

plannedActivities: Compare digital failure modes by issue type.
Review AI handoff reasons on routine cases.
Test revised guidance and fallback flows.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which digital and AI patterns become default in Q2.

items.title: Trusted platform discovery
items.name: Trusted platform discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether admin friction comes more from permission complexity, weak automation observability, or inconsistent integration patterns.
items.opportunity: Clarify which platform changes most improve readiness for Data Cloud and Agentforce rollout.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve trusted profile readiness, automation publishing, and reusable integration patterns.

riskFocus.question: Which trust and governance bottlenecks most slow platform expansion?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Automation observability and reusable integration patterns are now a larger bottleneck than raw low-code capability breadth.

plannedActivities: Review failed or delayed automation launches.
Compare integration pattern reuse by program.
Test simpler admin publishing and rollback guidance.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which platform guardrails become standard in Q2.
